calculate.def: 計算、預估、計畫、認為、計算的人的人、計算地 (算)
calculate.ex: Scientists are trying to calculate the temperature of the sun.

calculated.def: 計算好的、有計畫的人 (或物) (計)
calculated.ex: They made a calculated decision to enter the new market.

calculating.def: 計算的、深謀遠慮的、機警的的人 (或物) (權)
calculating.ex: He is a cold and calculating individual who only cares for profit.

calculation.def: 計算、估算、深思熟慮 (單數)
calculation.ex: By my calculation, we should arrive there around six o'clock.

calculative.ex: Her calculative approach to business helped her to succeed.

calculator.ex: You are allowed to use a pocket calculator in the exam.

calculus.ex: Differential calculus is a key part of university mathematics.

caldron/cauldron.def: 大鍋、充滿憤怒的地方、大鍋的人、大鍋地 (大鍋)
caldron/cauldron.ex: The ancient city was a boiling cauldron of political unrest.

calendar.def: 日曆、曆法、日程表、排入日程、日曆的人、曆法地 (曆)
calendar.col: lunar calendar, social calendar, calendar year
calendar.ex: I'll mark the date of the wedding on my wall calendar.

calender.def: 壓光機、滾壓機、滾壓物、滾壓的人的人 (機)
calender.ex: The paper is fed through the calender to make it smooth.

calf.def: 小牛、幼獸、(人)小腿、小牛地 (小牛)
calf.col: calf muscles, golden calf (金牛偶像/財富)
calf.ex: A young calf followed its mother across the green field.

caliber/calibre.def: (槍)口徑、才幹、水準、精確度個人物、才幹地 (幹)
caliber/calibre.col: man of high caliber, high calibre research
caliber/calibre.ex: The school attracts students of an exceptionally high caliber.

calibrate.def: 校準、測定口徑、使標準化、校準的人的人、校準地 (準)
calibrate.ex: The technicians need to calibrate the scientific instruments regularly.

calibration.ex: The standard calibration of the scale is checked every month.

calico.def: 印花棉布、(美)雜色的人的人物、棉布地 (布)
calico.ex: She bought some plain calico to make some kitchen curtains.

caliper/calliper.def: 游標卡尺、測徑器、(醫)托架 (常用複數)
caliper/calliper.ex: The engineer used a venier caliper to measure the small part.

caliph/kalif.def: 哈里發(伊斯蘭教主) (單數)
caliph/kalif.ex: The wise caliph was known for his justice and great mercy.

call.def: 呼叫、打電話、訪問、稱呼、要求、呼叫的人的人、呼叫地 (叫)
call.col: phone call, call off (取消), call for (要求), call on (拜訪), close call (僥倖脫險)
call.ex: I'll give you a call when I finish my work.

called.def: 被稱為的、名叫...的人的人
called.ex: He is an expert in a field called molecular biology.

caller.def: 呼叫者、訪客、電話呼叫的人 (單數)
caller.ex: The unknown caller hung up after only five seconds.

call-girl/callgirl.ex: The reporter conducted an interview with a former call-girl.

calligraphy.ex: She has been studying Chinese calligraphy for ten years.

calling.def: 職業、天職、召喚、呼叫的人 (或物) (召)
calling.ex: He finally found his true calling as a village teacher.

calliper/caliper.ex: The mechanic checked the brake callipers on the front wheels.

callisthenics/calisthenics.def: (常用複)健身操、健美運動 (複數)
callisthenics/calisthenics.ex: Morning callisthenics are part of the daily routine at camp.

callous.def: 無情的、冷硬的、起繭的、使冷酷、無情地 (硬)
callous.ex: He showed a callous disregard for the feelings of others.

calloused.def: 起繭的、長滿老繭的人的人 (或物) (繭)
calloused.ex: A lifetime of hard labor had left him with calloused hands.

callousness.def: 冷酷無情、起繭的人 (或物) (冷)
callousness.ex: The extreme callousness of the crime shocked the nation.

callously.ex: The management callously ignored the workers' complaints.
